corrected_fields.summary: This page is a structural overview of the ECB's research agenda, describing research areas and organizational coordination but containing no actual data releases, policy decisions, or market-relevant findings. The page lists seven research topic areas: monetary policy, fiscal policy, international macro, labour markets, forecasting, macro-finance, and financial institutions.
